info.title: Receipt Assistant API
info.description: Double-entry ledger backend. The v1 resources (transactions, postings, accounts, documents) are under active construction — see issues #33 (schema), #35 (transactions API), #36 (accounts API).

opening_balance_minor.description: Signed integer in the currency's minor unit (cents for USD, 1 for JPY, satoshi for BTC). Never store money as float.

get.summary: List accounts (tree by default, flat with ?flat=true)

200.description: Account list (flat: array of Account; default: array of AccountTreeNode roots)

get.summary: Account balance as of a date

post.summary: Add a posting to a transaction

200.description: Duplicate upload detected — returns the existing document row

delete.summary: Hard-delete a document (only if it has no links)

post.summary: Link a document to a transaction (idempotent)

delete.summary: Unlink a document from a transaction

post.summary: Upload N files for agent classification + extraction. Returns 202 with per-file ingest ids.

get.summary: Get one batch with all child ingests
Get one ingest with produced reverse-lookup

post.summary: Run the reconcile pipeline over an extracted batch. Idempotent: a second call on a reconciled batch returns the stored result.

202.description: Batch is already mid-reconcile on another caller; response carries a `poll` URL to fetch the final result.

409.description: Batch is not in a reconcilable state (still extracting, or entered reconcile_error).

get.summary: Fetch the latest reconcile result for a batch.

post.summary: Apply one or more reconcile proposals. For dedup proposals this voids the duplicate via the ledger service.
Reject one or more reconcile proposals. Marks proposals as rejected with no ledger mutation.

get.summary: Spend aggregated by category / account / payee
Time-series trend (MoM / YoY) of expense spend
Assets - liabilities at a point in time
Inflows vs outflows over a range, bucketed by month
